name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: FW: 🚨 Dirty Tricks Alert 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
This is my second competitive campaign for Congress, and both times, I've seen the far-right do everything they can to defeat me. But this was, by far, the most bizarre and dirty trick I've seen used
Friends, this is my second competitive campaign for Congress, and both times, I've seen the far-right do everything they can to defeat me. **But let me tell you -- this was, by far, the most bizarre and dirty trick I 've seen used against me in a campaign** (when the _Guardian_ reporter who wrote about this episode called it "one of the strangest stories I have ever reported on," I understood why). It should go without saying that dirty tricks have no place in our politics. And it should also go without saying that no one on our campaign would ever tolerate such behavior. We're running this race the right way, and I'm proud of it. We're going to win next month because of grassroots supporters like you -- [**so I would appreciate your support in the final stretch to help us defeat the far-right and their dirty tricks.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.13_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=39.68&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Yours, Tom \-----forwarded message----- From: Team O'Halleran Subject: 🚨 Dirty Tricks Alert 🚨 [](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.13_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=39.68&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Team, we told you that the far-right was desperate to unseat Tom. **Well, it turns out that they 're even more desperate than we thought. **Because, in what one journalist is calling "one of the strangest stories I have ever reported on," our campaign was the target of a **ridiculous, unethical, and illegal act** this week. Now, stay with us for a minute -- **because this is a long story, and it gets weird.** Here's what happened: Two young men walked into our campaign office, said they were supporters of Tom, and offered to donate **$39.68** to our campaign. _**Sounds normal enough, right?**_ Well, when our staff asked them to fill out donation paperwork -- and this is where it gets weird -- they acted strangely and wrote that they were members of a local chapter of the Communist Party. As it turned out, these two young men were NOT supporters of Tom. At least one was a staffer for the Arizona Republican Party -- and they wanted to give our campaign those **$39.68** in an apparent attempt to smear Tom and accuse him of having Communist sympathies! This was a dirty, illegal trick, **and it proves how absolutely desperate and determined the Republicans are to unseat Tom in November.** These sorts of dirty tricks have no place in our politics, team -- and our campaign is going to win this race without them. **And YOU can help us do it.** [**Can you make a donation of $39.68 -- yes, $39.68 -- right now to help us fight back against the far-right and their dirty tricks?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.13_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=39.68&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.13_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=39.68&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. body:
This is what's at stake.

| Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw this email from Mike, especially after this week's news. A new report released Monday from the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change warned that dire and irreversible effects on food shortages, wildfires, and mass die-off of coral reefs could occur as soon as 2040. I've been working on climate issues for the last few years, and I know that -- especially now -- when Washington won't take action, states have to. That's why I know Maryland can become a leader in the fight against climate change, because we simply have no other choice. Larry Hogan wants to take us backward, and with barely three decades left to truly reverse the effects of climate change, we can't afford to fall behind any more than we already have. **That's why generous Sierra Club donors have pledged to MATCH any donation for the next 24 hours, up to a total of $4,000.** [**Our bay, our oceans, and our climate can't wait -- donate $5 or more now to have it MATCHED, and let's fight for a cleaner, greener, and stronger Maryland by electing Ben Jealous.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3788c0/7ab0e2c4/7e1edebd/34987ee8/3953690340/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sierra-club?refcode=OHQ10148A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3788c0/7ab0e2c4/7e1edebd/34987eeb/3953690340/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sierra-club?refcode=OHQ10148A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

Subject: A clean energy champion](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3788c0/7ab0e2c4/7e1edebd/34987ee8/3953690340/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sierra-club?refcode=OHQ10148A")

[](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3788c0/7ab0e2c4/7e1edebd/34987ee8/3953690340/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sierra-club?refcode=OHQ10148A")

Friend,
Climate action is on the ballot this November. As Maryland continues to face smoggy summers, litter and debris flowing into the Chesapeake Bay, and the threat of dangerous climate disruption, we cannot accept anything short of immediate climate action.
This November, Marylanders can either elect a climate champion who will put the state on the path to 100% clean energy, or someone who fails to enact the bold action needed. This November, Maryland should make Ben Jealous its next governor.
**On behalf of our 70,000 members and supporters in Maryland, we here at the Sierra Club are thrilled to endorse environmental champion Ben Jealous in Maryland's 2018 gubernatorial election.** [**Donations made to Ben Jealous in the next 48 hours will be MATCHED, up to a total of $4,000. Will you join us in supporting his campaign with a donation of $5 or more now?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3788c0/7ab0e2c4/7e1edebd/34987ee8/3953690340/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sierra-club?refcode=OHQ10148A")

---
As governor, Ben has pledged to change the way Maryland confronts climate change with a real, concrete plan to bring green jobs to Maryland. Ben knows that rhetoric alone cannot solve the climate crisis and protect Marylanders. It's why he's put forth a plan to transition the state to 100% clean, renewable energy which will provide 21st-century jobs for the Maryland economy. Ben will end the system that saddles the communities with the fewest resources with the most pollution. And Ben will integrate environmental justice policies that ensure every Marylander has the same access to clean air and water.
Larry Hogan has failed to live up to the environmental champion he promised to be. The last four years have been marked by delays and half measures. Hogan vetoed The Maryland Clean Energy Jobs Act in 2016, and this year, he granted a permit to the fracked-gas Potomac Pipeline. This isn't climate action.
**We know which side Larry Hogan is on, and it's not ours.** [**Maryland needs a clean energy champion; Maryland needs Ben Jealous. If you agree, join the Sierra Club to show your support with a donation of $5 or more right now. Remember: Donations made to Ben Jealous in the next 48 hours will be MATCHED, up to a total of $4,000!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3788c0/7ab0e2c4/7e1edebd/34987ee8/3953690340/VEsHAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sierra-club?refcode=OHQ10148A")

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Endorsed by the Des Moines Register!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
**Last night the Des Moines Register, the largest paper in the state and the winner of 16 Pulitzer Prizes, endorsed our campaign in the race against Steve King.** I’m incredibly honored not only by this endorsement, but by their faith in me as a “promising new leader.” Every day we’re getting a little closer to defeating Steve King. [**_Help us keep up the pace by making a contribution today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2639034/15948813/-1273630535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2E0Mjg2Zi1lNWNmLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-I39hb3mQ6sq2j6Bk8XT6k74KJNpGl4V_3N2Ze-HD0k=)

Said the Register: _"This one’s a no-brainer for any Iowan who has cringed at eight-term incumbent King’s increasing obsession with being a cultural provocateur. In his almost 16 years in Congress, King has passed exactly one bill as primary sponsor, redesignating a post office. He won’t debate his opponent and rarely holds public town halls. Instead, he spends his time meeting with fascist leaders in Europe and retweeting neo-Nazis.

His Democratic challenger, J.D. Scholten, a 38-year-old former professional baseball player from Sioux City, is a breath of fresh air. He’s focused entirely on working for the 4th District, particularly rural communities that are struggling with the effects of low commodity prices, Trump’s trade war and workforce shortages as a result of the immigration crackdown. His party label doesn’t match that of many of his voters, but he can relate to people across the political spectrum.

We particularly like Scholten’s willingness to vote for new leadership of his caucus in the interest of easing partisan gridlock. We endorse him not just as an antidote for King’s virulent xenophobia but as a promising new leader."_

**It’s clear that our message is connecting with people, but with just 23 days until Election Day, we still have a lot of voters to reach**. [**_Please consider a contribution today. With your support, we can do what was once considered unthinkable—we can dethrone Steve King._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2639035/15948814/-1273630535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2E0Mjg2Zi1lNWNmLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-I39hb3mQ6sq2j6Bk8XT6k74KJNpGl4V_3N2Ze-HD0k=)

Standing Tall for All,
J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2639036/15948815/-1273630535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2E0Mjg2Zi1lNWNmLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-I39hb3mQ6sq2j6Bk8XT6k74KJNpGl4V_3N2Ze-HD0k=)

subject: Tomorrow: These key House races could be decided
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
The people we register to vote today and tomorrow could very well be the people who decide the slim margins in Virginia-2, Virginia-7, Virginia-10, and statewide. -------------------------------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e65/3986566565/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | [**The deadline to register to vote in Virginia is tomorrow, so we're running out of time to fill our Get Out the Vote Fund with $50,000 to fund our voter registration program.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e64/3986566565/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+The+deadline+to+register+to+vote+in+Virg&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")**[We've already talked to thousands of Virginians about registering to vote and getting their absentee ballots in, but we need to finish the job. We're $18,877 short - can you chip in to make sure we hit this important goal?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e7b/3986566565/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Wersquove+already+talked+to+thousands+of&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")**
---
| [**RUSH A DONATION**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e7a/3986566565/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+RUSH+A+DONATION&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")
---
Derek, read below to see exactly what this fund will pay for, and how important it is that we hit it. However you choose to help out will make a big difference to our team out in the field that will be working hard through [tomorrow night.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e79/3986566565/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+tomorrow+night&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")

**The people we register to vote today and tomorrow could very well be the people who decide the slim margins in Virginia-2, Virginia-7, Virginia-10, and statewide.**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Get-Out-the-Vote-Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e78/3986566565/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+httpssecuretimkainecomGetOuttheVoteFund&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")

\------------------------------------

Derek:

By the numbers, talking to and registering new voters is one of the best ways our team on the ground can use their time. Per hour it translates to more votes than say, phone calls (which are still very important, too!!).

So our team is doing just that this weekend: **Going out into every corner of Virginia to make sure folks know how to register and how to vote. Our team needs to put $50,000 towards this effort before the voter registration deadline on Monday. This $50,000 will keep our field team on the ground and make sure they have all the resources they need.**

[Will you help us fill this fund to make sure our volunteers have the clipboards, pens, and all the data and informational materials they need to pull off this major weekend?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e7f/3986566565/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Will+you+help+us+fill+this+fund+to+make+&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")

We've also just launched [TimKaine.com/Vote](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e7e/3986566565/VEsO/ "https://timkaine.com/vote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+TimKainecomVote&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND") (!) which will provide Virginians with all of the information they need to confidently head to the ballot box. When it comes to voting, there are no bad questions, and our team will be on standby to handle individual questions as well.

**But to build and sustain programs like this, we need resources to keep the lights on. Derek, it 's really important that you contribute to the Get Out the Vote Fund, but I'd like to give you some options on how you can do that:**
* 1\. Can't get out there yourself, but know the value of volunteering? [Donate $5 here to make sure our volunteers this weekend have the clipboards and pens they need to spend the whole day outside talking to voters.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e7d/3986566565/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+Donate+5+here+to+make+sure+our+volunteer&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")

* 2\. Want more people to see TimKaine.com/Vote and want to make sure people get individualized help if they need it? (Us too!). [Donate $50 here to help us expand our voting information materials and response team.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e7c/3986566565/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+Donate+50+here+to+help+us+expand+our+vot&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")

* 3\. Ready for Democrats to win in Virginia on November 6th? [Make a $100 investment to our field team so we can keep staff on the ground while our team mobilizes new and lifelong Democrats alike for Tim Kaine and all 11 House candidates in this final month.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e73/3986566565/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+Make+a+100+investment+to+our+field+team+&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")

* 4\. Have another amount you can spare today? [Contribute any amount you feel comfortable with here and we will route it to the department or program most in need.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e72/3986566565/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+Contribute+any+amount+you+feel+comfortab&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")

We only have two days to raise this money, but if everyone chips in a little, I know we can raise $21,091 more and fully fund this program by the deadline.

**If you can 't pitch in today, there are other ways you can help: Forward [TimKaine.com/Vote](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e71/3986566565/VEsHBg/ "https://timkaine.com/vote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=13+-+TimKainecomVote&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND") to friends or post it on your social media, and [sign up here to volunteer](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e70/3986566565/VEsHAQ/ "https://timkaine.com/events?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+sign+up+here+to+volunteer&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND") wherever you are.**

Donating here has a direct benefit which we will all (_hopefully!!_) see on Election Night if we can flip critical Virginia seats in the House and re-elect Tim Kaine:

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Get-Out-the-Vote-Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f100d/3e0906/7659de68/3e379e77/3986566565/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=15+-+httpssecuretimkainecomGetOuttheVoteFund&utm_campaign=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND&source=20181014_1_FR_TEAM_allocation-FWD-LDND")

Thanks for reading!

_Jessalyn Reid_
Digital Director
Kaine for Virginia

subject: Final report:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | This is it -- on Wednesday, I face my final Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline of my Senate reelection campaign.

**This is the final reporting deadline before the election, and my first head-to-head report against Libertarian Gary Johnson since super PACs dropped $2 million to support him.** Read more below on why this is a make-or-break moment for the rest of my campaign. Or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our final FEC fundraising deadline goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Help+me+reach+our+final+FEC+fundraising+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181014_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181014_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181014_1_1")_**

* * *

Earlier this month, my Senate race was flipped on its head when a national Libertarian super PAC announced it was spending millions to support Gary Johnson.

Since then, I've been amazed by the outpouring of support as we fight back against dark-money groups and share my vision for New Mexico. Now, we're facing one of our final tests before Election Day.

**Wednesday is the final FEC deadline before the election, and****afterwards****I will have to report my fundraising numbers for the last time before Election Day. With Johnson giving six-figures to his own campaign, we can 't afford a weak showing in the final weeks of this race.**
[DONATE $29 NOW >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181014_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181014_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181014_1_1") I already had a target on my back before Johnson entered the race. I've worked hard in the Senate to protect health care, public lands, and workers' rights -- which is why the Koch brothers launched ads against me earlier this year.

**Simply put: the stakes have never been higher for me, and this is our final chance before Election Day to make an impression.** That's why my team and I are focusing on more grassroots organizing and expanding our ad spending to reach as many voters as possible once early voting starts this Saturday.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To expand our campaign before early voting begins, our new budget goal is to raise an additional $75,000 before our Wednesday deadline. This is my first Senate reelection race, and all our hard work and more will be undone if Gary Johnson or Mick Rich defeats me in November. body:

---
Friend,

We're so excited to have former Vice President Joe Biden's support! Did you see his note? If not, check it out below.

The polls last week showed that this race is still a dead heat, so we're grateful that Joe Biden's endorsement came at such a critical time.

**[Please help Steve surge ahead by contributing $5 or more before it's too late.](https://act.myngp.com/el/bX53MPe6RtE8ZUqjKIG8vxOqeTUv254IJc61vCTnFmk=/fttrT8_R5eyqeFkYPB4mWL6-BrK5b4tVp0mCtkAY6do=?gpsid=37_57_4427&refcode=em18_181014_JBkick_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181014_JBkick_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Team Sisolak

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Joe Biden
Date: Thurs, Oct 10, 2018
Subject: I am endorsing Steve
---
Friend,

I love visiting Nevada. The people, the energy, the culture -- there are few other states quite like it. And there are very few candidates who reflect this state's values like Steve. That is why I am proud to endorse Steve Sisolak for Governor.

I am proud to support Steve because he's not only right on the issues, but he's also my kind of candidate. He comes from a blue-collar background, knows the value of hard work, and is all about standing up for families. That's how I know he'll put the interests of working Nevadans first.

**[Will you please consider supporting my friend Steve with a contribution to his campaign today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/bX53MPe6RtE8ZUqjKIG8vxOqeTUv254IJc61vCTnFmk=/fttrT8_R5eyqeFkYPB4mWL6-BrK5b4tVp0mCtkAY6do=?gpsid=37_57_4427&refcode=em18_181014_JBkick_L2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181014_JBkick_L2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Steve knows the challenges that come with trying to make payroll and with raising a family as a single dad. Steve's experience and vision make him the best choice for the Silver State. He will focus on improving public education, protecting Medicaid expansion, and creating good jobs across the state. I hope Nevadans will join me in supporting him on Election Day.

**[Please consider making a contribution to Steve today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/bX53MPe6RtE8ZUqjKIG8vxOqeTUv254IJc61vCTnFmk=/fttrT8_R5eyqeFkYPB4mWL6-BrK5b4tVp0mCtkAY6do=?gpsid=37_57_4427&refcode=em18_181014_JBkick_L3_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181014_JBkick_L3_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

---
Joe Biden

body:
Our campaign just broke a major record, and this community of supporters is the reason why.
| | Our campaign just broke a major record, and this community of supporters is the reason why, Peter. This weekend, our campaign announced that, thanks to a tremendous surge in grassroots support, **we raised more over a three-month period than any previous Democratic campaign in the history of the 7th district,** and you are the reason why. This is an incredible achievement, Peter, and it is a testament to the grassroots campaign that Abigail's message of positive change has inspired and that our dedicated team of volunteers has helped us build. We are so excited to enter the final stretch of this campaign with the resources we need to win this toss-up race. But we can't stop now, Peter. This is a tied race, and with 23 short days to go until the election, we can't afford to leave anything on the table. On election night, this race could come down to as few as a handful of votes -- **so it will be all hands on deck until the end.** [**To support our voter outreach efforts over the next 23 days, will you make a donation today, so that we can continue to break records, and then deliver a win for Virginia families on November 6th?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2knjAtEnSu7mBY8sv_v6fjjdmikB9SI70mD0uy-U3o0=/qRSPtPanVOv6-QLaeiVMqw-usWs844bib9mcTD1NlF8=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.14_b1_ec_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Emma Carl _Finance Director, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2knjAtEnSu7mBY8sv_v6fjjdmikB9SI70mD0uy-U3o0=/qRSPtPanVOv6-QLaeiVMqw-usWs844bib9mcTD1NlF8=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.14_b1_ec_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2knjAtEnSu7mBY8sv_v6fjjdmikB9SI70mD0uy-U3o0=/qRSPtPanVOv6-QLaeiVMqw-usWs844bib9mcTD1NlF8=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. Hello --

The aftermath of Hurricane Michael left many parts of North Florida devastated. But here in the Sunshine State, we stick together and help our neighbors in times of need.

Throughout the past week, we've opened up our offices to accept supplies and the response has been overwhelming -- and we need your help to keep the momentum going.

**[We're teaming up with relief organizations on the ground and have set a goal to raise $20,000 for these non-profits to help those in need -- will you join us? Your donation will be matched.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3668/9e00690/50585d65/2401ad8a/1252386127/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-hurricanemichael?gpsid=9_55_4420&refcode=em18_181013_HMR_adv_gq_ful__&utm_campaign=em18_181013_HMR_adv_gq_ful__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Were+teaming+up+with+relief+organization")**

Team Gillum

name: Johanna Cervone, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Imagine
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366b/9e00690/50ac91f2/2401ad9e/2505130045/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181012_Future_resend_fnd_gq_nono__JC_ettx&source=em18_181012_Future_resend_fnd_gq_nono__JC_ettx")
Friends,

I want you to imagine what Florida is like when Mayor Andrew Gillum is Governor...

The minimum wage is a living wage. Our jobs are good-paying jobs that let you support your family -- all thanks to our investments in clean energy, infrastructure, and innovation.

Healthcare is a right guaranteed to all in our state constitution. No matter what happens at the federal level, Floridians can access healthcare without being denied or charged more based on pre-existing conditions.

More five-year-olds than ever before are ready to enter kindergarten, thanks to increased access to early childhood education. Our well-funded public schools are prepared to accommodate them without overcrowded classrooms. We no longer have a teacher shortage, because we're finally paying our teachers what they're worth.

Some of our new high school graduates have already entered their career fields, with help from SHOP 2.0 training. Others are excited about attending college without massive student loan debt.

We'll think back on this campaign when everyday people stood up together and fought for a better Florida, and people from all walks of life made their voices heard. But now, we've got to do the work to make it all possible, which is why we're asking:

**[Will you invest in this future for Florida by making a contribution today?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366b/9e00690/50ac91f2/2401ad96/2505130045/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4382&refcode=em18_181012_Future_resend_fnd_gq_nono__JC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181012_Future_resend_fnd_gq_nono__JC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+Will+you+invest+in+this+future+for+Flori")**

I can't wait to win this election on Tuesday, November 6, with you. Thank you for being a part of our journey.

Bring it home,

Johanna Cervone
Communications Director

name: Sally Yates, Former Deputy Attorney General
subject: Early vote is about to start.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
I'm supporting Stacey Abrams for Governor of Georgia. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8f5/34a064cc/e4d24b1/70d2ccd/118620193/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - I'm reaching out to you today as a concerned Georgian. It's never been more important for our leaders to do what's right rather than what's easy. _That 's why I'm supporting Stacey Abrams for Governor of Georgia._ As Democratic Leader in the Georgia House, Stacey fought to defend Georgia's values of inclusion, justice, and equality. As governor, she'll be more than a firewall against divisive, abnormal politics in Washington - Stacey Abrams will also be a leader who strives for unity in our state. **Stacey is the champion we need to take on the fights we can't face alone. I hope you will join her in the fight for the values we hold dear and help her win in November.** You can support her campaign in two ways: The first is, get to the polls. In-person early voting starts tomorrow, and Stacey needs as many supporters as possible to make their voices heard before Election Day. **[You can also help by making a donation to Stacey Abrams' campaign right now, so her team can reach out to millions of Georgians with information about where and when they can vote early.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8f5/34a064cc/e4d24b1/70d2cca/118620193/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDE0MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE101418-full")** Even during dark times and difficult moments, our resilience has kept our nation strong. Our commitment to the values we share will make us even stronger. Thank you for standing up, Sally Yates Former Deputy Attorney General
